spec_ref: RW-PROD-004 §6 / Evidence: 5 scenari JSON diff tra release

scenarios.name: boot_ready_all_ok
scenarios.description: Worker fully wired: registered, bootstrapped, cache+blob ready, executors>0, disk free above threshold. Master + compose healthcheck see 200.
scenarios.operators_should_see: compose healthcheck PASS, master /api/v1/workers healthy, canary no_reasons=true

scenarios.name: cold_boot_blocked_on_bootstrap
scenarios.description: Worker at process+networking layer up but pkg/bootstrap.Run has NOT yet returned. Master + compose healthcheck see 503.
scenarios.operators_should_see: compose healthcheck STARTING, master selector not yet offering slots, canary bootstrap_not_run

scenarios.name: drain_mode_steady_state
scenarios.description: Worker received MsgDrain; gracefully refusing new offers but finishing in-flight tasks. Live=200 (process+loop alive), Ready=503 (not accepting new work).
scenarios.operators_should_see: compose healthcheck TRANSIENT (kubelet moves pod out of service endpoints), master selector moves worker to drain, canary drain_mode

scenarios.name: disk_pressure_alert
scenarios.description: Disk watcher flipped DiskFreeBytes below threshold (100MiB free vs 1GiB floor). Ready=503 with disk.critical.
scenarios.operators_should_see: operator pager fires on disk.critical alert, master selector demotes worker to STALE -> DISCONNECTED, canary disk.critical

scenarios.name: empty_executor_registry_misconfig
scenarios.description: Composition root forgot to call registry.MustRegister before w.Start (e.g. a --validate-config probe). Ready=503 with executors.empty.
scenarios.operators_should_see: doctor --validate-config catches this BEFORE Start() (RW-PROD-002 cross-link); without --doctor, master selector sees registered=false because Start() should not be reached with empty registry

master_side_complement.scenarios_covered: empty fleet, all-stale fleet, revoked workers, mixed (one stale + one fresh passes)
